name: Meta Platforms, Inc.
business: Meta Platforms, Inc. sells advertising placements on its family of apps (Facebook, Instagram, Messenger, WhatsApp, Threads) to marketers, generating substantially all of its revenue. The company also sells consumer hardware products including virtual reality headsets (Meta Quest) and AI glasses (Ray-Ban Meta, Oakley Meta, Meta Ray-Ban Display), along with related software and content.

exposures.sentence: In particular, we expect our AI initiatives will require significantly increased investment in infrastructure.
We have designed and built our own data centers and key portions of our technical infrastructure, and a substantial portion of our technical infrastructure is also provided by third parties.

Further, our ability to continue to develop and effectively deploy AI technologies is dependent on access to specific third-party equipment, technology, and other technical and physical infrastructure, such as processing hardware, network capacity, models, computing power, and related energy requirements, as to which we cannot control the availability or pricing, especially in a highly competitive environment.

the occurrence of security breaches, improper access to or disclosure of our data or user data, and other cyber incidents, as well as intentional misuse of our services and other undesirable activity on our platform
In addition, the online commerce vertical was the largest contributor to the increase in advertising revenue in 2025 compared to 2024.
They can do this through Feed, Reels, Stories, Groups, Marketplace, and more.

Our current product offerings in VR include our Meta Quest devices, as well as software and content available through the Meta Horizon Store, which enable a range of social experiences that allow people to defy physical distance while engaging in gaming, fitness, entertainment, and more.

Our current product offerings in VR include our Meta Quest devices, as well as software and content available through the Meta Horizon Store, which enable a range of social experiences that allow people to defy physical distance while engaging in gaming, fitness, entertainment, and more.
Our current AI glasses include the Ray-Ban Meta and Oakley Meta glasses, which feature Meta AI, our advanced conversational assistant, as well as other features such as hands-free interaction.
It comes with the Meta Neural Band, which is a wrist-worn wearable device that uses electromyography to let people control their AI glasses using neuromuscular signals.

catalysts.event: Capital expenditure guidance for 2026 of $115 billion to $135 billion
catalysts.sentence: We anticipate making capital expenditures of approximately $115 billion to $135 billion in 2026 to support our AI efforts and core business.

catalysts.event: Reality Labs expense split for 2026: 70% wearables, 30% VR and Horizon
catalysts.sentence: In 2026, we expect to spend approximately 70% of our Reality Labs operating expenses on our wearables initiatives, and the remaining 30% on our VR and Horizon initiatives.

catalysts.event: Reality Labs operating losses expected to remain similar in 2026 to 2025
catalysts.sentence: we expect our 2026 RL operating losses to remain similar to 2025.

catalysts.event: Effective tax rate guidance for 2026 in range of 13-16%
catalysts.sentence: we expect our effective tax rate for the full year 2026 to be in the range of 13-16%.

catalysts.event: Key investment areas for 2026: AI, Reels, discovery engine, wearables, monetization, youth, platform integrity, infrastructure capacity
catalysts.sentence: In 2026, we intend to focus on several key investment areas: AI, Reels and our discovery engine, wearables, monetization of our products and services, youth, platform integrity and community support, and infrastructure capacity.
